name: patient-safety-ai
description: Check drug interactions, validate dosages, assess patient risk, and generate safety alerts. Uses evidence-based reference data. Not a substitute for clinical judgement.

tools.name: check_drug_interactions
tools.description: Check known drug interaction databases for a list of medications. Pass drugs as comma-separated string.

tools.name: assess_patient_risk
tools.description: Risk scoring based on patient conditions, age, and comorbidities. Conditions and medications as comma-separated strings.

tools.name: validate_dosage
tools.description: Check dosage against known safe ranges for a medication.

tools.name: generate_safety_alert
tools.description: Create a formatted clinical safety alert. Alert types: interaction, allergy, dosage, contraindication.

tools.name: check_allergy_conflicts
tools.description: Cross-reference a medication against patient allergies including cross-reactivity. Allergies as comma-separated string.
